title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding providers.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama—import GPT-4 prompts, RAG, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Go CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick pulls, lists, and chat from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub-Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example: chunk documents, generate embeddings with Ollama, and query via Llama-3.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets a server chat with any Ollama model through slash commands.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim wrapper for the Ollama REST API—chat, pull, and delete models from native Nim code.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API with Tokio.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java SDK for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; chat, pull, list, and delete models in JVM apps.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & persistent model storage.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri-based desktop GUI for Ollama (Windows/Linux/macOS) with chat history.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET 8 community SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for C# with IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service container and exposes models to CI pipelines for testing.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a side-panel chat powered by a local Ollama model for note Q&A.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack bot using Socket-mode to chat privately or in channels with any Ollama model.

title: ollama-rust-embeddings
summary: Rust micro-service that exposes Ollama embedding endpoints via Axum for fast vector generation.
